インタフェース DamageTracker

既知の実装クラスのリスト:
DamageReport
public interface DamageTracker
Abstraction for recording cumulative simulation damage and producing DPS summaries.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    default double
    getDamageBySource(String sourceName)
    Returns the accumulated damage attributed to a specific source name.
    double
    getDps(double rotationTime)
    Computes DPS using the currently accumulated total and the given rotation time.
    double
    getTotalDamage()
    Returns the total accumulated damage across all sources.
    void
    printReport(double rotationTime)
    Prints a formatted damage summary for the given rotation duration.
    void
    recordDamage(String sourceName, double damage)
    Records a damage instance under the given source name.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • recordDamage

      void recordDamage(String sourceName, double damage)
      Records a damage instance under the given source name.
      パラメータ:
      sourceName - the character or synthetic source to attribute the damage to
      damage - the damage amount to accumulate

    • getTotalDamage

      double getTotalDamage()
      Returns the total accumulated damage across all sources.
      戻り値:
      total damage

    • getDamageBySource

      default double getDamageBySource(String sourceName)
      Returns the accumulated damage attributed to a specific source name.
      パラメータ:
      sourceName - the source name as passed to recordDamage(String, double)
      戻り値:
      damage total for that source, or 0.0 if not found

    • getDps

      double getDps(double rotationTime)
      Computes DPS using the currently accumulated total and the given rotation time.
      パラメータ:
      rotationTime - simulated rotation duration in seconds
      戻り値:
      DPS value

    • printReport

      void printReport(double rotationTime)
      Prints a formatted damage summary for the given rotation duration.
      パラメータ:
      rotationTime - simulated rotation duration in seconds
